## Context Scaffold
For decisions, conventions, and patterns see `context/`:
- `context/ROUTER.md` — navigate to the right context for your task
- `context/decisions.md` — why things are the way they are
- `context/conventions.md` — project-specific rules and norms
- `context/patterns/` — reusable solutions discovered during implementation

Run `/intel` to populate. Use `/remember` to add entries. Use `/recall` to load at session start.
